## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing. 
     e.g. "I often need to convert strings to camelCase but the library doesn't support it." -->

---

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see added. Be as specific as possible. -->

**Proposed function name:** <!-- e.g. toCamelCase -->

**Expected behaviour:**

```js
// Input / output example
toCamelCase('hello world'); // → 'helloWorld'
toCamelCase('foo_bar_baz'); // → 'fooBarBaz'
```

---
